image:image.image:title: Tasnim Mahmud — AI Founder and Developer Bangladesh
image:image.image:caption: Tasnim Mahmud, Founder and CEO of AIRCIMpco. Creator of MahmudGPT, AirLearn AI, and Auto-GradeX. Bangladesh AI pioneer and software developer. Official photo of Tasnim Mahmud.

image:image.image:title: Tasnim Mahmud — AIRCIMpco Founder working on AI projects Bangladesh
image:image.image:caption: Tasnim Mahmud at his desk building AI systems in Bangladesh. Founder and CEO of AIRCIMpco. Creator of MahmudGPT, AirLearn AI and Auto-GradeX.

image:image.image:title: Tasnim Mahmud — Photo of Tasnim Mahmud AI Founder Bangladesh
image:image.image:caption: Tasnim Mahmud exploring Bangladesh. Young AI founder, software developer, and CEO of AIRCIMpco. Creator of MahmudGPT and AirLearn AI.

image:image.image:title: AIRCIMpco Logo — Bangladesh AI Research Organization founded by Tasnim Mahmud
image:image.image:caption: AIRCIMpco logo. Artificial Intelligence Research Collaboration Integration Migration Production Company. Founded by Tasnim Mahmud. aircimpco.lovable.app

image:image.image:title: AIRCIMpco Plus+ — Advanced AI Research Platform Bangladesh by Tasnim Mahmud
image:image.image:caption: AIRCIMpco Plus+ by Tasnim Mahmud. Advanced AI research platform from Bangladesh.

image:image.image:title: TM Logo — Tasnim Mahmud personal brand mark AI Founder Bangladesh
image:image.image:caption: TM personal brand logo of Tasnim Mahmud. AI Founder and Developer from Bangladesh.
